column5: Also, other shit I wanna watch this week: - Magnolia (before Weapons) - Funny Games… actually maybe Zodiac, Mulholland, and Inland Empire (Fincher’s energized yet still cold and horrific cinematography, Lynch’s performances and manic desire for fame. Both inspo for Asymmetrical) - Strangers On a Train and To Catch a Thief (budding re-interest in Hitchcock) My own personal watchlist. Aside from a few specific titles, I mentioned Tupac, Eminem, Tyler, Andre 3000, Snoop, and A$AP to my dad. Also remembered Kanye was in the allegedly shitty Zoolander sequel. Also look up Dre and 50 Cent since I think they act as well. Maybe Jay-Z too?
